tasks.subject: remote-dialog-ux-redesign [P1] Fix mobile drawer width leak
tasks.description:
Fix the mobile drawer width leak where `max-w-md` leaks to `DrawerContent` on mobile, overriding the full-width `inset-x-0` positioning from the Vaul drawer.

## File to Modify

`apps/client/src/layers/features/settings/ui/TunnelDialog.tsx`

## Current Code (line 312)

```tsx
<ResponsiveDialogContent className="max-h-[85vh] max-w-md">
```

## Required Change

Add `useIsMobile` import and apply `max-w-md` only on desktop:

```tsx
import { useIsMobile } from '@/layers/shared/model';
```

Inside the component body:
```tsx
const isMobile = useIsMobile();
const isDesktop = !isMobile;
```

Update the `ResponsiveDialogContent`:
```tsx
<ResponsiveDialogContent className={cn('max-h-[85vh]', isDesktop && 'max-w-md')}>
```

The `cn` utility is already imported from `@/layers/shared/lib`. The `useIsMobile` hook is already exported from `@/layers/shared/model`.

## Why This Matters

The Vaul drawer uses `inset-x-0` for full-width mobile positioning. When `max-w-md` (max-width: 28rem) is applied to `DrawerContent`, it constrains the drawer to ~448px, breaking the full-width bottom-sheet behavior on mobile devices. Constraining `max-w-md` to desktop-only restores the intended drawer behavior.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `useIsMobile()` is called inside `TunnelDialog`
- [ ] `ResponsiveDialogContent` has `className={cn('max-h-[85vh]', isDesktop && 'max-w-md')}`
- [ ] On mobile (useIsMobile returns true), `max-w-md` class is NOT applied
- [ ] On desktop (useIsMobile returns false), `max-w-md` class IS applied
- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] No TypeScript errors
tasks.activeForm: Fixing mobile drawer width leak by constraining max-w-md to desktop
